_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: both hetero- and homozygous deletion of Fak protected against hearing loss to a degree consistent with that seen in wild-type (WT) mice
details: Both hetero- and homozygous deletion of Fak protected against hearing loss to a degree consistent with wild-type mice
